message.content:
Explore the web app at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3 to extract the design system details needed for mobile parity. Read these files:
1. client/src/index.css - all CSS variables for colors, fonts, spacing
2. client/src/App.jsx - how fonts are loaded, theme setup
3. client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ - any relevant styling
4. client/src/components/ProfilePage/ - profile styling patterns
5. Any glass morphism CSS patterns (search for "backdrop-filter" or "glass" in CSS files)
6. Auth screen styling (search for auth-related CSS)
7. PostCard or similar post display components and their CSS

Focus on extracting exact color values, font families, spacing values, border radius values, shadow values, and glass morphism patterns.

content.text:
I now have a comprehensive picture of the entire design system. Here is the complete extraction:

---

## iskrib_v3 Design System -- Complete Reference for Mobile Parity

---

### 1. FONTS

**Google Fonts import** (in `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`, line 1):

```
https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;0,800;1,400;1,500&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,500&family=Nunito:ital,wght@0,200..1000;1,200..1000&family=Comfortaa:wght@300..700&family=Lexend+Deca:wght@100..900&family=Patrick+Hand&family=Shadows+Into+Light&family=Sniglet:wght@400;800
```

**CSS custom properties:**
- `--font-ui: "Outfit", sans-serif` -- primary UI font (body, labels, buttons)
- `--font-serif: "Lora", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif` -- content/reading font

**Additional font-family usages by context:**
- **Brand logo / headings**: `"Playfair Display", serif` (login brand, sidebar header, settings title, form titles)
- **Profile names / section headers**: `"Lexend Deca", sans-serif` (profile name, stat numbers, profile bg picker header, layout builder title, freedom wall title)
- **Feed post titles**: `"Lexend Deca", sans-serif` (`.feed-title`)
- **Body text (serif)**: `var(--font-serif)` / `"Lora"` (`.feed-text-content`, `.cv-body`, panel copy)

**Base `:root` font settings:**
- `font-family: "Outfit", sans-serif`
- `line-height: 1.5`
- `font-weight: 400`
- `font-optical-sizing: auto`
- `font-synthesis: none`
- `text-rendering: optimizeLegibility`
- `-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased`
- `-moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale`

---

### 2. COLOR SYSTEM (CSS Variables)

**Light Theme (`:root`)**  -- file: `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css`

| Token | Value | Usage |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg-primary` | `#FAF9F6` | Page background |
| `--bg-secondary` | `#F3F1ED` | Secondary surfaces, search input bg |
| `--bg-hover` | `#EDEAE5` | Hover states |
| `--bg-elevated` | `#FFFFFF` | Elevated cards, modals |
| `--bg-card` | `#FEFEFE` | Card backgrounds |
| `--bg-backdrop` | `rgba(250,249,246,0.75)` | Semi-transparent overlays |
| `--bg-backdrop-heavy` | `rgba(250,249,246,0.85)` | Heavier overlays |
| `--bg-overlay` | `rgba(250,249,246,0.3)` | Light overlays |
| `--bg-pill` | `rgba(120,100,80,0.06)` | Pill/chip backgrounds |
| `--bg-glass` | `rgba(255,255,255,0.55)` | Glass morphism surfaces |
| `--bg-glass-border` | `rgba(200,180,150,0.2)` | Glass borders |
| `--bg-selection` | `rgba(212,168,83,0.08)` | Selection bg |
| `--bg-selection-active` | `rgba(212,168,83,0.15)` | Active selection bg |
| `--text-primary` | `#1A1612` | Primary text |
| `--text-heading` | `#12100D` | Headings |
| `--text-secondary` | `#6B6560` | Secondary text |
| `--text-body` | `#8A8480` | Body/muted paragraphs |
| `--text-muted` | `#A8A29E` | Muted labels |
| `--text-faint` | `#C0BBB5` | Faintest text |
| `--text-separator` | `#D9D4CE` | Separator dots |
| `--border-light` | `rgba(120,100,80,0.12)` | Light borders |
| `--border-card` | `rgba(120,100,80,0.08)` | Card borders |
| `--accent-purple` | `#C4943E` | Primary accent (actually gold/amber) |
| `--accent-dark` | `#1A1612` | Dark accent (buttons) |
| `--accent-dark-hover` | `#3A3530` | Dark accent hover |
| `--accent-sage` | `#8A9E7A` | Green/sage accent |
| `--accent-amber` | `#D4A853` | Amber accent |
| `--icon-default` | `#8A8480` | Default icon color |
| `--icon-view` | `rgba(26,22,18,0.25)` | View icon |
| `--icon-view-count` | `rgba(26,22,18,0.55)` | View count |
| `--color-danger` | `#DC2626` | Error/danger |
| `--color-danger-bg` | `rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.08)` | Danger background |
| `--color-success` | `#16A34A` | Success |
| `--color-success-bg` | `rgba(22, 163, 74, 0.08)` | Success background |
| `--loader-color` | `#C4943E` | Loading spinner |

**Dark Theme (`[data-theme="dark"]`)**

| Token | Value |
|---|---|
| `--bg-primary` | `#0C0C0C` |
| `--bg-secondary` | `#141414` |
| `--bg-hover` | `#1E1E1C` |
| `--bg-elevated` | `#1A1A18` |
| `--bg-card` | `#161614` |
| `--bg-backdrop` | `rgba(12,12,12,0.8)` |
| `--bg-backdrop-heavy` | `rgba(12,12,12,0.9)` |
| `--bg-overlay` | `rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` |
| `--bg-pill` | `rgba(255,240,210,0.06)` |
| `--bg-glass` | `rgba(255,255,255,0.05)` |
| `--bg-glass-border` | `rgba(255,240,210,0.08)` |
| `--text-primary` | `#F0EBE3` |
| `--text-heading` | `#F5F0E8` |
| `--text-secondary` | `#B0A89E` |
| `--text-body` | `#908880` |
| `--text-muted` | `#6B6560` |
| `--text-faint` | `#504A45` |
| `--text-separator` | `#2E2A26` |
| `--border-light` | `rgba(255,240,210,0.06)` |
| `--border-card` | `rgba(255,240,210,0.04)` |
| `--accent-purple` | `#D4A853` |
| `--accent-dark` | `#F0EBE3` |
| `--accent-dark-hover` | `#C8C0B5` |
| `--accent-sage` | `#9AB08A` |
| `--accent-amber` | `#E0BA6A` |
| `--icon-default` | `#908880` |
| `--icon-view` | `rgba(240,235,227,0.25)` |
| `--icon-view-count` | `rgba(240,235,227,0.55)` |
| `--color-danger` | `#EF4444` |
| `--color-danger-bg` | `rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12)` |
| `--color-success` | `#22C55E` |
| `--color-success-bg` | `rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.12)` |
| `--loader-color` | `#D4A853` |

**Hardcoded accent colors used throughout CSS (not via variables):**
- `#D4A853` -- used directly for search focus ring, suggestion hover, mobile nav active dot, write button, amber accents
- `#e6a817` -- sidebar freedom wall CTA text, nav button text
- `#FFD700` -- Legend badge border/glow
- `#9B59FF` -- OG badge border/glow
- `#FFA500` -- Legend badge gradient end
- `#7B2FFF` -- OG badge gradient end
- `rgb(255, 100, 100)` / `rgb(255, 42, 42)` -- notification badges
- `rgb(72, 208, 135)` -- success toast, bookmarked message

---

### 3. SHADOW SYSTEM

| Token / Usage | Value |
|---|---|
| `--shadow-card` | Light: `0 1px 4px rgba(80,60,40,0.06), 0 4px 16px rgba(80,60,40,0.04)` / Dark: `0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| `--shadow-card-sm` | Light: `0 1px 2px rgba(80,60,40,0.05)` / Dark: `0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)` |
| `--shadow-modal` | Light: `0 8px 32px rgba(80,60,40,0.12)` / Dark: `0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)` |
| `--shadow-dropdown` | Light: `0 4px 16px rgba(80,60,40,0.1), 0 0 0 1px rgba(120,100,80,0.06)` / Dark: `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,240,210,0.04)` |
| Card hover | `0 6px 24px rgba(80, 60, 40, 0.07)` |
| Profile bg picker | `0 12px 48px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 0 0 1px var(--border-light)` |
| Reaction picker | `0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)` |
| Search dropdown | `0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)` |
| Mobile nav bar | `0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)` |
| Primary button | `0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)` (hover: `0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12)`) |
| Auth dark mode primary hover | `0 4px 20px rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.25)` |

---

### 4. BORDER RADIUS VALUES

| Context | Value | File |
|---|---|---|
| Cards (`.cards`) | `12px` (mobile: `10px`) | postcards.css |
| Editor container | `16px` (mobile: `12px`) | editor.css |
| Auth form card | `12px` | login.css / signup.css |
| Auth modal | `12px` | authmodal.css |
| Settings section | `12px` | SettingsPage.css |
| Profile hero section | `20px` | myprofile.css |
| Profile avatar | `50%` | myprofile.css |
| Profile stats/name/bio/date containers | `14px` | myprofile.css |
| Toolbar buttons | `6px` | editor.css |
| Search input | `10px` (mobile: `8px`) | postcards.css |
| Mobile nav bar | `16px` | mobilenavlink.css |
| Mobile nav items | `12px` | mobilenavlink.css |
| Mobile sidebar | `10px` | mobilesidebarlink.css |
| Sidebar links | `12px` | sidebar.css |
| Pill/badge shapes | `999px` (full round) | various |
| Badge pills | `20px` | myprofile.css |
| Save/CTA buttons | `15px` / `25px` | editor.css / myprofile.css |
| Auth input | `8px` | login.css |
| Auth buttons | `8px` | login.css |
| Gradient boxes (profile bg) | `10px` | myprofile.css |
| Layout builder modals | `18px` | myprofile.css |
| Content viewer embedded card | `12px` | contentviewer.css |
| Repost card | `10px` | postcards.css |
| Toast | `8px` | postcards.css |
| Color popover | `8px` | editor.css |
| Theme toggle track | `12px` | sidebar.css |
| Settings back button | `8px` | SettingsPage.css |

---

### 5. SPACING SYSTEM

The app uses `rem`-based spacing throughout. Key patterns:

**Page-level padding:**
- Desktop sidebar: `250px` fixed width
- Desktop center column: `750px` width
- Postcards parent: `padding: 0 16px`, `gap: 16px` (mobile: `padding: 0 10px`, `gap: 12px`)
- Content viewer article: `max-width: 620px`, `padding: 0 24px` (mobile: `padding: 0 16px`)
- Settings page: `max-width: 520px`, `padding: 32px 20px 64px`

**Card internal spacing:**
- Card content: `padding: 1rem 1.15rem 0.6rem 1.15rem` (mobile: `0.75rem 0.75rem 0.4rem 0.75rem`)
- Card icons bar: `padding: 0.5rem 1.15rem 0.85rem 1.15rem` (mobile: `0.5rem 0.75rem 0.7rem 0.75rem`)
- Editor: `padding: 1rem 1.5rem` (mobile: `0.75rem`)
- Auth form: `padding: 40px 36px` (mobile 1024px: `padding: 0`)
- Auth panel: `padding: 64px 72px` (tablet: `48px 40px`, mobile: `36px 24px`)
- Profile hero: `padding: 1.4rem 1.4rem 1.2rem 1.4rem`

**Gap values:**
- Form fields: `gap: 20px` (auth), `gap: 16px` (settings)
- Card content: `gap: 0.8rem`
- Sidebar links: `gap: 0.35rem`
- Sidebar link items: `gap: 0.85rem` (icon to label)
- Profile hero sections: `gap: 0.8rem`
- Search bar items: `gap: 0.5rem`

---

### 6. GLASS MORPHISM PATTERNS

This is the signature visual pattern used extensively across profile pages and overlays.

**Standard Glass Card** (used on profile stats, name, bio, actions, joined date):
```css
background-color: var(--bg-glass);          /* light: rgba(255,255,255,0.55), dark: rgba(255,255,255,0.05) */
backdrop-filter: blur(25px);
-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(25px);
border: 0.5px solid var(--bg-glass-border); /* light: rgba(200,180,150,0.2), dark: rgba(255,240,210,0.08) */
border-radius: 14px;
padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
transition: background-color 0.25s ease;
```
Hover state: `background-color: var(--bg-glass-border);`

Files using this pattern:

---

### 8. ANIMATION / TRANSITION PATTERNS

**Standard transition timing:**
- Buttons/links: `0.15s ease`
- Background/color: `0.2s ease`
- Glass containers: `0.25s ease`
- Profile hero hover: `0.35s ease`
- Theme transitions: `0.2s ease`

**Named animations:**
- `slideUp` -- auth form card entrance: `0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)`
- `fadeIn` -- form messages: `0.3s ease`
- `spin` -- button spinner: `0.7s linear infinite`
- `image-spin` -- editor image spinner: `0.8s linear infinite`
- `morph` -- auth decorative blobs: `20s ease-in-out infinite`
- `bgFadeIn` -- profile bg: `0.6s ease-out`
- `searchDropdownIn` -- dropdown: `0.2s ease-out`
- `glow-legend` / `glow-og` -- badge glow: `2s ease-in-out infinite alternate`

**Micro-interactions:**
- Cards: `transform: translateY(-2px)` on hover
- Buttons: `transform: translateY(-1px)` on hover, `scale(0.98)` on active
- Profile avatar: `scale(1.04)` on hover
- Gradient boxes: `scale(1.08) rotate(1.5deg)` on hover

---

### 9. LAYOUT BREAKPOINTS

| Breakpoint | Target |
|---|---|
| `max-width: 1024px` | Tablet -- auth pages stack vertically |
| `max-width: 768px` | Sidebar shrinks to 200px, center to 550px, right sidebar hidden |
| `max-width: 640px` | Editor mobile overrides |
| `max-width: 600px` | Auth page compact form |
| `max-width: 480px` | Primary mobile breakpoint -- sidebar hidden, full-width center, bottom nav appears, mobile top header appears |
| `max-width: 428px` | Additional mobile refinements |

**Mobile layout structure (at 480px):**
- Desktop sidebar: `display: none`
- Right sidebar: `display: none`
- Center column: `width: 100%`
- Top: sticky mobile brand header (`position: sticky, z-index: 122`)
- Bottom: floating nav bar (`position: fixed, bottom: 0.6rem, z-index: 120`)
- Mobile sidebar: slide-up sheet from bottom-left

### 11. FORM INPUT PATTERN

```css
/* Auth Input */
font-family: var(--font-ui);
border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
background: var(--bg-primary);           /* dark: var(--bg-elevated) */
padding: 14px 16px;                      /* mobile: 12px 14px */
border-radius: 8px;
font-size: 0.95rem;                      /* mobile: 16px for iOS zoom prevention */
color: var(--text-primary);

/* Focus */
border-color: var(--accent-amber);
box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.12);

/* Label */
font-size: 0.7rem;
font-weight: 600;
color: var(--text-muted);
letter-spacing: 0.12em;
text-transform: uppercase;
```

---

### 12. SCROLLBAR STYLING

```css
scrollbar-width: thin;
scrollbar-color: var(--text-muted) transparent;   /* or rgba(140, 140, 140, 0.3) transparent */
/* webkit */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }               /* or 4px for sidebar */
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--text-muted); border-radius: 4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background-color: transparent; }
```

### 13. Z-INDEX HIERARCHY

| z-index | Component |
|---|---|
| `9999` | Splash screen, full-screen image view |
| `200` | Auth modal overlay, setting modals, reaction picker |
| `140` | Profile editor overlay, layout builder |
| `136` | Profile bg picker, font selector |
| `132` | Editor parent (mobile) |
| `130` | Editor parent (desktop) |
| `127` | Mobile sidebar overlay |
| `122` | Mobile top header |
| `121` | Newsfeed header (mobile), Freedom wall toolbar (mobile) |
| `120` | Mobile bottom nav, newsfeed header |
| `112` | Welcome message |
| `14` | Search shell |
| `12` | Search top bar |
| `11` | Image actions, uploading overlay |
| `10` | Content viewer header |
| `5` | Toolbar wrapper |
| `3` | Profile loading |
| `2` | Sidebar |
